query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'orders' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('acceptedAt', 'pickedUpAt', 'deliveredAt') ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4EV5ivwhyC7eCUY.ebc471170149 --database 4KwtmFvvd67FSFhQ5dyp9H --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'orders' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('acceptedAt', 'pickedUpAt', 'deliveredAt') ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
acceptedAt	timestamp
deliveredAt	timestamp
pickedUpAt	timestamp
